name: TCIL_RemovePeerControlAssignment
title: TCIL_RemovePeerControlAssignment
syntax: long TCIL_RemovePeerControlAssignment(dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser,) // form 1
long TCIL_RemovePeerControlAssignment(node tc, dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser) // form 2
description: The function separates a setpoint value user from the setpoint value source.
If the task status and the assignment is active the TC IL sends the unassignment messages to both the setpoint value user and the assigned setpoint value source.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: This DDI of the setpoint value user that has to be separated from the setpoint value source.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: elementNumberUser
parameters.description: The elementNumber of the setpoint value user that has to be separated from the setpoint value source.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
